data.title: North Node
data.summary: Direction of evolution, learning, growth potential and incarnational path.
data.micro_note: The North Node indicates a growth trajectory more than an already mastered trait.

data.title: South Node
data.summary: Heritage, acquired reflexes, familiar territory and resources already available but sometimes overused.
data.micro_note: The South Node describes a known support point that should remain in service of evolution.

data.title: Lunar Apogee
data.summary: Orbital point of maximum lunar distance, used as the astronomical basis for some Lilith readings.
data.micro_note: The lunar apogee is first a calculated orbital datum.

data.title: Lunar Perigee
data.summary: Orbital point of maximum lunar proximity, symbolically associated with intensified lunar presence.
data.micro_note: The lunar perigee completes the apsidal axis with a symbolism of proximity.

data.title: Black Moon Lilith
data.summary: Symbolic point derived from the lunar apogee, associated with radical autonomy, refusal of submission and non-negotiated psychic material.
data.micro_note: Black Moon Lilith is a calculated symbolic point, not a physical body.
